temporal_description: (00:00-00:05) In a dimly lit, modern office, two men in white shirts and ties stand side-by-side. The man on the left, with a stern expression, turns to the man on the right, who looks at him with concern. The first man extends his hand, and they share a firm handshake, accompanied by a distinct slapping sound. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and serious atmosphere, suggesting a significant agreement or confrontation has just occurred between the two characters.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A distinct, sharp slapping sound is heard as the two men shake hands.)
